competency_framework.description: This certification validates the ability to design, implement, and manage AI-driven solutions within an enterprise environment, focusing on agent creation, conversational design, integration, and security.

domains.name: Agent Creation & Configuration
domains.description: Covers the skills required to create and configure AI agents, including defining actions, triggers, and workflows.

skills.name: Agent Configuration
skills.description: Ability to configure agent settings, including generative AI orchestration and skills management.

skills.name: Action and Workflow Definition
skills.description: Skill in defining actions such as API calls, email sending, and external system integration.

skills.name: Trigger Management
skills.description: Expertise in setting up event-based triggers to initiate automated flows.

domains.name: Conversational Design
domains.description: Focuses on designing effective conversation flows and managing topics to ensure relevant and accurate agent responses.

skills.name: Intent and Topic Management
skills.description: Ability to manage conversation flows by defining intents, triggers, and responses.

skills.name: Evaluation and Testing
skills.description: Skill in managing test cases to measure the accuracy and quality of agent responses.

skills.name: User Engagement Analysis
skills.description: Expertise in analyzing user interactions to improve conversation design.

domains.name: Connectors/Integrations
domains.description: Involves integrating AI agents with various channels and external systems to enhance functionality.

skills.name: Channel Deployment
skills.description: Ability to deploy agents across different channels using the Channels tab and Publish tools.

skills.name: External System Integration
skills.description: Skill in integrating agents with external systems to trigger workflows and actions.

skills.name: API Management
skills.description: Expertise in managing API calls and integrations to extend agent capabilities.

domains.name: Security & Governance
domains.description: Ensures that AI solutions are secure, compliant, and adhere to governance standards.

skills.name: Agent Authentication
skills.description: Ability to manage agent authentication settings to ensure secure access.

skills.name: Data Privacy and Compliance
skills.description: Skill in ensuring that AI solutions comply with data privacy regulations and governance standards.

skills.name: Responsible AI Implementation
skills.description: Expertise in applying Responsible AI principles to ensure ethical AI deployment.

assessments.title: Configure an AI Agent for Customer Support
assessments.scenario: You are tasked with setting up an AI agent for a retail company to handle customer inquiries about order status, product information, and returns.
assessments.instructions:
1. Access the agent configuration settings.
2. Set up generative AI orchestration to handle natural language queries.
3. Define skills for managing order status, product information, and returns.
4. Ensure the agent can trigger actions such as sending confirmation emails and updating order status in the system.
expected_outputs: Configured AI agent with generative AI orchestration
Defined skills for order status, product information, and returns
Set up actions for email sending and order status updates

assessments.title: Design a Conversational Flow for a Banking Chatbot
assessments.scenario: A bank wants to implement a chatbot to assist customers with account balance inquiries, transaction history, and branch locations.
assessments.instructions:
1. Define intents for account balance inquiries, transaction history, and branch locations.
2. Set up conversation flows using the Topics tab to manage these intents.
3. Create test cases in the Evaluation tab to ensure the accuracy and quality of responses.
4. Analyze user engagement using the Analytics tab to identify areas for improvement.
expected_outputs: Defined intents and conversation flows for banking services
Test cases created and evaluated for response accuracy

assessments.title: Integrate an AI Agent with a CRM System
assessments.scenario: A company wants to integrate their AI agent with a CRM system to automate customer data updates and notifications.
assessments.instructions:
1. Use the Channels tab to deploy the agent on the company's website.
2. Set up API calls to the CRM system to update customer data based on interactions.
3. Configure the agent to send notifications to customers via email after data updates.
4. Test the integration to ensure seamless data flow and notification delivery.
expected_outputs: Agent deployed on the company website
API calls set up for CRM integration

assessments.title: Implement Security Measures for an AI Agent
assessments.scenario: A healthcare provider needs to ensure their AI agent complies with data privacy regulations and is secure against unauthorized access.
assessments.instructions:
1. Configure agent authentication settings to restrict access to authorized users only.
2. Review and implement data privacy measures to comply with healthcare regulations.
3. Apply Responsible AI principles to ensure ethical deployment of the AI agent.
4. Document the security and compliance measures implemented.
expected_outputs: Documentation of security and compliance measures

rubrics.assessment_ref: Configure an AI Agent for Customer Support

criteria.novice: The AI orchestration is partially set up, with limited ability to handle natural language queries.
criteria.competent: The AI orchestration is fully set up and can handle basic natural language queries effectively.
criteria.expert: The AI orchestration is expertly configured, handling complex natural language queries with high accuracy.

criteria.criterion: Skill definition for order status, product information, and returns
criteria.novice: Skills are defined but lack clarity and completeness, leading to frequent errors in handling inquiries.
criteria.competent: Skills are clearly defined and handle most inquiries accurately, with occasional errors.
criteria.expert: Skills are comprehensively defined, handling all inquiries accurately and efficiently.

criteria.criterion: Action setup for email sending and order status updates
criteria.novice: Actions are set up but often fail to trigger correctly or lack necessary details.
criteria.competent: Actions are set up correctly and trigger as expected in most scenarios.
criteria.expert: Actions are expertly configured, triggering flawlessly and providing detailed confirmations.

rubrics.assessment_ref: Design a Conversational Flow for a Banking Chatbot

criteria.novice: Intents and flows are defined but are incomplete or confusing, leading to poor user experience.
criteria.competent: Intents and flows are well-defined, providing a satisfactory user experience with minor issues.
criteria.expert: Intents and flows are expertly crafted, offering a seamless and intuitive user experience.

criteria.novice: Test cases are created but lack thoroughness, resulting in missed errors.
criteria.competent: Test cases are comprehensive and identify most errors, ensuring good response accuracy.
criteria.expert: Test cases are exhaustive, ensuring all potential errors are identified and corrected.

criteria.novice: User engagement analysis is superficial, providing limited insights for improvement.
criteria.competent: User engagement analysis is detailed, identifying key areas for improvement.
criteria.expert: User engagement analysis is in-depth, offering actionable insights that significantly enhance the chatbot's performance.

rubrics.assessment_ref: Integrate an AI Agent with a CRM System

criteria.novice: Agent is deployed but experiences frequent downtime or accessibility issues.
criteria.competent: Agent is deployed successfully with minor accessibility issues.
criteria.expert: Agent is seamlessly deployed, fully accessible and operational at all times.

criteria.criterion: API call setup for CRM integration
criteria.novice: API calls are set up but often fail or return incorrect data.
criteria.competent: API calls are correctly set up and function as expected in most cases.
criteria.expert: API calls are expertly configured, ensuring seamless and accurate data exchange.

criteria.novice: Email notifications are configured but often fail to send or contain errors.
criteria.competent: Email notifications are configured correctly and work as expected in most scenarios.
criteria.expert: Email notifications are flawlessly configured, ensuring timely and accurate delivery.

rubrics.assessment_ref: Implement Security Measures for an AI Agent

criteria.novice: Authentication settings are configured but are easily bypassed or incomplete.
criteria.competent: Authentication settings are robust, preventing unauthorized access in most cases.
criteria.expert: Authentication settings are highly secure, ensuring only authorized access at all times.

criteria.novice: Data privacy measures are implemented but do not fully comply with regulations.
criteria.competent: Data privacy measures are implemented and comply with most regulatory requirements.
criteria.expert: Data privacy measures are comprehensively implemented, fully complying with all regulations.

criteria.novice: Responsible AI principles are acknowledged but not fully applied, leading to ethical concerns.
criteria.competent: Responsible AI principles are applied, ensuring ethical deployment with minor issues.
criteria.expert: Responsible AI principles are thoroughly applied, ensuring ethical and responsible deployment.

criteria.criterion: Documentation of security and compliance measures
criteria.novice: Documentation is incomplete or lacks clarity, making it difficult to understand the measures implemented.
criteria.competent: Documentation is clear and covers most security and compliance measures implemented.
criteria.expert: Documentation is comprehensive and clearly details all security and compliance measures, facilitating easy understanding and review.

item_bank.stem: Design a workflow for an AI agent that integrates with an external CRM system to update customer records when a new order is placed. Describe the actions, triggers, and any API calls involved.
item_bank.competency_ref: Agent Creation & Configuration - Action and Workflow Definition
item_bank.expected_response_summary: The response should include a detailed workflow that outlines the actions such as API calls to the CRM system, triggers based on new order events, and the sequence of operations to update customer records.
item_bank.scoring_notes: Evaluate the completeness of the workflow, the appropriateness of the actions and triggers, and the correct use of API calls.

item_bank.stem: Analyze a conversation flow where users frequently abandon the interaction. Identify potential issues with intent and topic management and propose improvements.
item_bank.competency_ref: Conversational Design - Intent and Topic Management
item_bank.expected_response_summary: The analysis should identify issues such as unclear intents, missing topics, or inappropriate responses. Proposed improvements might include refining intents, adding new topics, or adjusting responses to better meet user needs.
item_bank.scoring_notes: Assess the ability to identify issues accurately and the feasibility and effectiveness of the proposed improvements.

item_bank.stem: You are tasked with deploying an AI agent across multiple communication channels. Describe the steps you would take using the Channels tab and Publish tools.
item_bank.expected_response_summary: The response should outline the process of using the Channels tab to select and configure channels, and the Publish tools to deploy the agent. It should include considerations for channel-specific settings and testing.
item_bank.scoring_notes: Check for a clear understanding of the deployment process and the ability to address channel-specific requirements.

item_bank.stem: Evaluate the security measures in place for an AI agent that handles sensitive customer data. Discuss how you would ensure compliance with data privacy regulations.
item_bank.competency_ref: Security & Governance - Data Privacy and Compliance
item_bank.expected_response_summary: The evaluation should cover current security measures such as encryption and access controls, and propose additional measures if needed. It should also discuss compliance with relevant data privacy regulations like GDPR or CCPA.
item_bank.scoring_notes: Look for a thorough evaluation of security measures and a clear understanding of data privacy compliance requirements.

item_bank.stem: Create a test case to evaluate the accuracy of an AI agent's responses in a customer support scenario. Include the criteria you would use to measure success.
item_bank.expected_response_summary: The test case should include specific scenarios, expected responses, and criteria such as response accuracy, relevance, and user satisfaction to measure success.
item_bank.scoring_notes: Assess the comprehensiveness of the test case and the appropriateness of the success criteria.

item_bank.stem: Describe how you would configure agent authentication settings to ensure secure access to an AI agent used in a financial institution.
item_bank.expected_response_summary: The response should include steps to configure authentication settings such as multi-factor authentication, role-based access controls, and secure token management.
item_bank.scoring_notes: Evaluate the security measures proposed and their suitability for a financial institution context.

item_bank.stem: Analyze user engagement data from the Analytics tab to identify trends and suggest improvements for an AI agent's conversation design.
item_bank.expected_response_summary: The analysis should identify trends such as common drop-off points or frequently asked questions, and suggest improvements like refining conversation flows or adding new topics.
item_bank.scoring_notes: Check for accurate identification of trends and practical, data-driven suggestions for improvement.

item_bank.stem: Outline the steps to integrate an AI agent with a third-party payment processing system to automate transaction confirmations.
item_bank.expected_response_summary: The response should detail the integration process, including setting up API calls, defining triggers for transaction events, and configuring the agent to send confirmation messages.
item_bank.scoring_notes: Evaluate the clarity and completeness of the integration steps and the correct use of APIs and triggers.

item_bank.stem: Discuss how you would apply Responsible AI principles to the deployment of an AI agent in a healthcare setting.
item_bank.expected_response_summary: The discussion should cover principles such as fairness, transparency, and accountability, and how they can be applied to ensure ethical AI deployment in healthcare.
item_bank.scoring_notes: Assess the understanding of Responsible AI principles and their application in a sensitive context like healthcare.

item_bank.stem: Design a conversational flow for an AI agent that assists users in booking travel arrangements. Include intents, triggers, and potential user responses.
item_bank.competency_ref: Conversational Design - Intent and Topic Management
item_bank.expected_response_summary: The design should include clear intents for booking flights, hotels, and cars, appropriate triggers for user inputs, and a variety of potential user responses to guide the conversation.
item_bank.scoring_notes: Evaluate the clarity and completeness of the conversational flow and the appropriateness of the intents and triggers.

blueprint.target_audience: AI professionals, solution architects, and IT managers responsible for implementing AI-driven solutions in enterprise environments.
blueprint.prerequisites: Candidates should have a foundational understanding of AI concepts, basic programming skills, and familiarity with enterprise IT environments.
blueprint.program_overview:
The AI Champion Certification is designed to validate the expertise required to design, implement, and manage AI-driven solutions within an enterprise setting. This program focuses on the critical areas of agent creation, conversational design, integration, and security, ensuring that certified professionals can effectively deploy AI technologies to enhance business operations. Participants will gain hands-on experience in configuring AI agents, designing conversational flows, integrating with external systems, and ensuring compliance with security and governance standards.

The certification program is structured to provide a comprehensive learning path that covers both theoretical knowledge and practical application. Through a series of modules, candidates will develop skills in agent configuration, action and workflow definition, and trigger management. Additionally, the program emphasizes the importance of conversational design, enabling candidates to create intuitive and effective user interactions. Integration skills are honed through practical exercises in deploying agents across various channels and managing API integrations. Finally, the program addresses the critical aspects of security and governance, ensuring that AI solutions are both secure and compliant with industry standards.
domain_summary: Agent Creation & Configuration: Develops skills in creating and configuring AI agents, including defining actions, triggers, and workflows.
Conversational Design: Focuses on designing effective conversation flows and managing topics for accurate agent responses.
Connectors/Integrations: Involves integrating AI agents with various channels and external systems to enhance functionality.
Security & Governance: Ensures AI solutions are secure, compliant, and adhere to governance standards.
blueprint.assessment_strategy: The assessment strategy for the AI Champion Certification is performance-based, focusing on real-world tasks that demonstrate a candidate's ability to apply their knowledge in practical scenarios. Instead of traditional multiple-choice exams, candidates will complete a series of hands-on projects and simulations that mirror the challenges faced in enterprise environments. These assessments are designed to evaluate proficiency across all domains, ensuring that candidates can effectively configure AI agents, design conversational flows, integrate with external systems, and implement security measures. Each assessment is accompanied by a detailed rubric that outlines the criteria for success, providing clear guidance on the expected level of competence.
blueprint.renewal_cadence: The certification is valid for three years, after which recertification is recommended to ensure that professionals remain current with the latest advancements in AI technology and best practices. This interval reflects the rapid pace of innovation in the AI field and the need for ongoing professional development.
